'''Finkea Furnishings''' is the in-app shop where users can purchase [[furniture]] and interior items for their [[Birb|birb's]] [[birbhouse]] using [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. [[File:FunitureStoreRedSquare.png|thumb]] Users can also sell furniture and interior items at half price for rainbow stones. [[Robin]] is your friendly interior designer at Finkea Furnishings.[[File:Finkea Furnishings.png|thumb|Finkea Furnishings.]] === Rare Item Slots === Items from previous events are sold here. They are not available every day, just for 24 hours. Each item has a specific color that cannot be changed - if it says it's the blue one, you're only able to buy the blue one. Six items are offered for sale to everyone; six additional items are only on sale for [[Finch Plus]] members. Note that any item can appear in any slot; there are no members-only items. The members just have access to six more choices at a time, plus a 50% off item advertised at the top of the page. [[File:HalfPriceItemsFinchPlus.jpg|thumb]] == Seasonal Item Sloths == There different special sloths. For example, Seasonal Item Sloths. Those only appear on top of the sloths during October and December. You cant buy these items in other months. == Location Item Sloths == On every location there are special Items which are only available at that location. You can recognize these items based on them being on top of the sloths, as well as them having a lighter background with a world card in the upper corner of the sloth. === Item Refresh === The cycle button lets you refresh the shop to get offered different items. You get one free refresh per day. The new items will be random, and usually different from the 12 just seen. Again they will be specific colors. With luck, an item you have been wanting will appear in the color you want. You can't go back to the previous offerings - when you refresh, they are gone! Once the free refresh is used, the player must pay Rainbow Stones to refresh again. Every time the player refreshes the shop, it costs more: 10, 35, 60, 85, 110, 135, and 160 stones. The cumulative total is 595 stones. === Everyday Collection === The Everyday Collection is a collection of furnishings that does not rotate. The same ones are offered every day. The menu display colour of the item may change, but can be switched back to the preference of the player. When you click one, you can try it in your birbhouse, and also try it in other colors, if available. To switch the colour the player needs to select the item and scroll at the bottom. All the colour choices will show, except for ones you have already purchased.
'''NOTE:''' The last item is unpatterned basic "'''wallpaper'''" in 12 different colors. The second-to-last item is the '''floor''', which offers *all* floor colors in the game: over 50! === Catalog === You can Search (use the magnifying glass) to see and try on ALL of the different furnishing items in the game! However, don't get too attached - you can only buy them when they are offered in the store. [[File:CatalogandSellButtons.jpg|thumb]] === Sell === To sell items back to the shop, there is an icon with a black bag with a Rainbow Gem on it. When you click on the icon it will display a screen with all your furnishings, and underneath each it will display the value. [[File:InventorySellFuniture.jpg|thumb]] The value is half of the purchase price; if you bought it for 500 rainbow stones, you will get 250 for it. If you bought it for 300, it will be 150 and 450 for an item which cost 900 rainbow stones.When you sell an item, it is removed from your inventory and favorites.
